invariants.text: forall j: int {:trigger p[j]} | 0 <= j < |p| :: 1 <= p[j] && p[j] <= n
forall j: int, k: int {:trigger p[k], p[j]} | 0 <= j < k < |p| :: p[j] != p[k]
forall x: int {:trigger x in p} {:trigger x in seen} | x in seen :: x in p
forall x: int {:trigger x in seen} {:trigger x in p} | x in p :: x in seen
forall j: int {:trigger p[j]} {:trigger s2[j]} | 0 <= j < |s2| :: s2[j] == p[j]

requires.text: forall i: int {:trigger a[i]} | 0 <= i < |a| :: 1 <= a[i] && a[i] <= n
forall i: int {:trigger a[i]} | 0 <= i < |a| :: 1 <= a[i] && a[i] <= n
